'''鈭歫-w-dh-z''' ('''kajawdhezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tyrannize|tyrannize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-w-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tyrannize|tyrannize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-w-dh-z
|-
! Lemma
| kajawdhezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijawdhezoko|thijawdhezoko]] || [[word:jijawdhezoko|jijawdhezoko]] || [[word:shijawdhezoko|shijawdhezoko]] || [[word:kijawdhezoko|kijawdhezoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
